channel.title: Genshin Guide Blog
channel.description: Latest Genshin Impact guides, builds, and team recommendations

item.title: ⛰️ Xilonen Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts & Teams (v6.4)
item.description: Complete Xilonen build guide for v6.4 — best weapons, artifacts, team compositions, and constellations. The ultimate Natlan support.

item.title: 🚀 Game Accelerator Free Trial — 50 Hours Low-Ping Gaming
item.description: Claim 50 hours of free game accelerator time. Reduce Genshin Impact ping from 200ms to 30-50ms on EU/NA servers.

item.title: 🔥 Mavuika Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts & Teams (v6.3)
item.description: Complete Mavuika build guide for v6.3. Best weapons, artifacts, teams, and constellation analysis for the Pyro Archon.

item.title: ⭐ Top 10 Must-Build 4-Star Characters (2026 Edition)
item.description: The best 4-star characters worth building in Genshin Impact v6.3 — ranked by impact and team flexibility.

item.title: Top 10 Genshin Impact Gifts — Perfect for Any Traveler in 2026
item.description: The ultimate Genshin Impact gift guide for 2026. Official merch, digital codes, and gaming gear for every budget.

item.title: Best Teams for Spiral Abyss v6.3 — 36-Star Guide
item.description: Complete Spiral Abyss v6.3 team guide with enemy lineups, F2P alternatives, and pro tips for 36 stars.

item.title: Mavuika Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts & Teams
item.description: Complete Mavuika build guide for v6.3. Best artifacts, weapons, team comps, and rotation tips.

item.title: How to 36-Star Spiral Abyss as a Free-to-Play Player
item.description: F2P-friendly guide to clearing Spiral Abyss. Budget teams, ER thresholds, and resource planning.

item.title: Natlan Meta Shift — How New Characters Changed the Game
item.description: Deep analysis of how Natlan characters reshaped the Genshin Impact meta.

item.title: v6.3 Banner Guide — Who to Pull For
item.description: Analysis of Mavuika, Citlali banners and reruns. Pull recommendations for every account type.
